mapper.select: SELECT * FROM friend_group WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend_group (user_id, group_name, sort_order) VALUES (#{userId}, #{groupName}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM friend_group WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE friend_group SET group_name = #{groupName} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
